name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Government-backed crop insurance scheme for farmers against crop loss due to natural calamities, pest attacks, and weather anomalies
eligibility: KCC holder, agricultural land owner, notified crop grower
premium: Kharif: 2%, Rabi: 1.5% of sum insured. Government pays remaining premium
benefit: Full compensation for crop loss. Government subsidizes 90%+ of premium cost
trigger_signals: weak monsoon, drought, below normal rainfall, flood, pest attack, IMD warning

name: KCC Limit Enhancement and Restructuring
description: Increase or restructure the Kisan Credit Card limit based on enhanced crop value or financial stress
eligibility: Existing KCC holder with minimum 2 years clean repayment history
premium: No processing fee. Interest: 4% p.a. with subvention
benefit: Higher credit for seeds, fertilizers, equipment. Interest subvention by government
trigger_signals: input cost rise, MSP change, crop season start, drought, weak monsoon

name: SBI Home Loan Balance Transfer and Refinancing
description: Transfer existing high-interest home loan to SBI's current lower rates after RBI rate cuts
eligibility: Existing home loan with any bank, 12+ months clean repayment, property with clear title
premium: 0.5% processing fee, waived for women borrowers
benefit: Reduced EMI burden immediately after RBI rate cut. Save up to ₹3000/month on ₹30L loan
trigger_signals: RBI repo rate cut, interest rate reduction, monetary policy, repo rate

name: SBI Home Loan Top-Up
description: Additional loan on existing home loan for renovation or emergency needs
eligibility: Existing SBI home loan, 24+ months clean repayment, property value appreciation
benefit: Low-interest funding for home improvement. Disbursed within 3 days
trigger_signals: festival season, diwali, renovation spending, property price rise

name: SBI Jan Dhan Recurring Deposit
description: Small-ticket recurring deposit scheme specifically for Jan Dhan account holders to build savings habit
eligibility: Active Jan Dhan account with at least 3 months transaction history
benefit: 6.5% interest rate. Builds financial discipline. Qualifies for future loan eligibility
trigger_signals: PM-KISAN installment, government salary credit, MNREGA payment, scheme disbursement

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima (PMJJBY)
description: Low-cost life insurance scheme for Jan Dhan and savings account holders
eligibility: Age 18-50, active savings/Jan Dhan account, auto-debit consent
benefit: ₹2 lakh life insurance cover. Family protected at ₹36/month
trigger_signals: PM-KISAN credit, government scheme enrollment, low income segment, festival

name: SBI MSME Emergency Credit Line Guarantee Scheme
description: Emergency credit buffer for small businesses facing cash flow stress due to economic disruptions
eligibility: MSME account with 2+ year SBI relationship, GST registered, turnover < ₹25Cr
premium: 8.5% interest. No collateral required under ECLGS
benefit: Instant credit up to 20% of outstanding or ₹5L max. 12-month moratorium available
trigger_signals: sector layoffs, IT slowdown, economic stress, MSME policy, budget MSME provision

name: SBI Mudra Loan - Kishor and Tarun Category
description: Collateral-free loans for micro and small enterprises for business expansion
eligibility: Non-farm enterprise, no credit default history, viable business plan
premium: 10-12% interest. No processing fee under Mudra scheme
benefit: ₹50,000 to ₹10L without collateral. Government credit guarantee covers default risk
trigger_signals: budget MSME announcement, Mudra scheme expansion, interest subsidy, startup news

name: SBI Salary Pre-Credit Advance
description: Short-term advance against upcoming salary for government and corporate employees
eligibility: Salary account with SBI, 6+ months salary history, government or listed company employee
premium: 10% p.a. interest for 30 days. Zero prepayment penalty
benefit: Up to 3x monthly salary in 30 minutes. Auto-repaid on salary credit
trigger_signals: government salary delay, end of month, festival advance, emergency

name: SBI Mutual Fund SIP via YONO
description: Systematic Investment Plan starting ₹500/month directly from SBI account through YONO app
eligibility: Active SBI savings account, YONO registration, PAN and KYC complete
benefit: Wealth creation starting ₹500/month. Tax saving under ELSS funds up to ₹1.5L deduction
trigger_signals: salary hike, PM-KISAN credit, budget tax savings, mutual fund rally, market opportunity
